content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of the Physical Layer in the OSI model?",
      "options": ["A) To provide error-free transfer of data", "B) To define the physical means of data transmission", "C) To route data between devices", "D) To encrypt data"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "The Physical Layer is responsible for defining the physical means of data transmission, including the type of cable, wiring, and wireless communication methods."
